3c0e81b6f345.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
3c0e81b6f345.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
3c0e81b6f345.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

79da33116009.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
79da33116009.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
79da33116009.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

87a01361057c.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
87a01361057c.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

4cf596b79723.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
4cf596b79723.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
4cf596b79723.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

d0a806e360bc.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
d0a806e360bc.description: Your 4.5/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P29.4). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
d0a806e360bc.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

4967aa6d6efc.title: Ranked #13 of 18 locally — peers are ahead
4967aa6d6efc.description: At percentile 29.4, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

502eca7df060.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
502eca7df060.description: You trail peers by 1.1 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

c04c9d77289d.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
c04c9d77289d.description: With 1602 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
